A Taste
That Will Hook You.

Το Τσιγκέλι — The Meat Hook

Charcoal-grilled meats, hand-picked mezedes, and the warmth of old Cyprus — all gathered around a butcher's hook in the heart of Agios Athanasios square.

Book a Table → View Menu
Our Story

A Hook,
A Hearth, A Home.

Tucked into the picturesque town-hall square of Agios Athanasios, To Tsigkeli — "the meat hook" — was born from a simple idea: bring back the butcher's-grill taverna the way our grandparents knew it. Carefully selected meats hung from the hook, hand-prepared mezedes, and the kind of welcome that makes strangers feel like family by the second glass of wine.

Our masterful grillers work the charcoal each evening to produce ribs that fall from the bone, just-right pork and chicken skewers, traditional village sausages and pastourma that have quickly become some of the most talked-about plates in Limassol.

For those who don't eat meat, the same care extends across the menu: boiled halloumi, village pasta and ravioli, wild mushrooms slow-roasted in the embers, crispy potatoes, and the eternal classic — zucchini with eggs.

"A favourite spot for those 'hooked' on authentic Cypriot cuisine." — Cyprus Mail, 2024
★ 4.3
Google Rating

From The Hook, To Your Plate.

Από το Τσιγκέλι στο πιάτο — carefully selected meats and authentic Cypriot mezedes, grilled and prepared each evening in the heart of the square.

Let Us Decide

Tell us how many you are and let our kitchen send out a procession of mezedes — from the hook, the grill, and the garden — until you cannot eat another bite.

Call to Reserve · 70 00 00 60
A Limassol Evening

Built For Sharing.

Pull a chair, pour a glass, and let the plates keep coming. The taverna way is generous, slow, and unhurried — a long evening built from many small moments.

Whatever the kitchen is proud of tonight will find its way to your table — sometimes a plate of charcoal-blistered souvlaki, sometimes a bowl of velvety tzatziki to chase it with. Just say yes, and let the meal unfold.

The Experience

More Than A Meal.

Live Rebetiko Thursdays

Every Thursday evening, local musicians fill the room with Rebetiko — uplifting but never so loud that you cannot hear the table next to you laugh.

The Butcher's Grill

Our meats hang on the hook, cut to order, and meet the charcoal only when your table calls for them. No shortcuts, no compromise.

The Square at Night

Sit out on the Agios Athanasios town-hall square as the evening cools — one of the most picturesque dining settings in Limassol.

Guest Voices

What Our
Guests Say.

Based on 95+ Google Reviews
"
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

An amazing tavern with a warm atmosphere and delicious traditional Cypriot flavors. Welcoming, friendly staff, generous quantity and reasonable prices. The tahini, ktipiti, tender pork souvlaki, crispy pork belly and eggplant meatballs were favourites. You should totally give it a try.

M
Maria K.
Google Reviews
"
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

We really enjoyed our food here. Great taverna with tasty food. We ordered the meze and they brought us so much food — the eggs with zucchini and the chicken souvlaki were the best we had in a while. Service was excellent. We will visit again.

A
Andreas P.
Google Reviews
"
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

Excellent tavern with traditional Cypriot food and mezedes. Nice quality and tasty. The staff was very helpful and kind. The house wine, Grifos, is excellent — and at the end of the meal they brought us something traditional and sweet on the house.

E
Elena S.
